workers.name: db-schema
workers.prompt: Create the database schema and migrations for the billing feature. Include tables for invoices, payments, and subscriptions.

workers.name: api-endpoints
workers.prompt: Build REST API endpoints for billing: GET/POST /invoices, GET/POST /payments, GET /subscriptions. Use Express.js with proper validation.

workers.name: ui-components
workers.prompt: Create React components for the billing dashboard: InvoiceList, PaymentForm, SubscriptionCard. Use TypeScript and Tailwind CSS.
